title: Vileda Turbo 3 in 1 Mop and Bucket Set with Microfibre Mop Head, Spin Mop & Bucket For Cleaning All Hard Floors, Effortless Wringing with Foot Pedal, Scrubbing Pad on Mop Head for Stubborn Dirt
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: COMPLETE SET - The Vileda 3in1 spin mop and bucket set comes with a bucket, spinning wringer, telescopic mop handle and a washable mop head

HANDS-FREE WRINGING - Thanks to the foot pedal operated spinning mechanism, you can adjust the dampness of the mop to your needs without getting your hands wet; The spin mop bucket also includes a splash barrier, keeping the water inside the bucket while wringing

DEEP CLEANING MICROFIBRE - The microfibre 3in1 mop head uses millions of strands of advanced microfibre to effectively capture dirt and grime with just plain water, eliminating the need for harsh chemicals; Safe for all hard flooring, including finished hardwood, laminate, tile, vinyl and more

40% MORE CLEANING POWER* - innovative combination of stings and mop pad, to create the effective 3in1 cleaning power, which removes even coarse stubborn dirt. It removes over 99% of bacteria with just water* – no need for harsh chemicals! *Up to 40% more cleaning power on stubborn dirt vs 100% microfibre refill in a lab test
MACHINE WASHABLE - The TURBO 3in1 microfibre mop head is easily detachable, and can be washed in the washing machine at up to 30°C. Re-use it again and again!
REACHES EVERYWHERE - Due to the patented triangle shaped mop-head, the Turbo 3in1 mop can reach and clean deep into corners, under furniture, alongside skirting boards, and between tiles
HANDLE EXTENDS FULLY TO 123 CM - With a telescopic handle that extends up to 123 cm, anyone can mop comfortably without bending over
description: From the manufacturer Vileda Turbo 3in1 Spin Mop and Bucket System with a combination of string and mop pad cleaning power The efficient all-in-one floor cleaning solution The Vileda 3in1 Spin Mop and Bucket Set is the ideal solution for your weekly floor cleaning. Thanks to the powerful, fine microfibre, you do not need any chemicals to achieve a thorough clean. The practical system includes mop, bucket and handle. The wring mechanism is controlled by a foot pedal so you can adjust the dampness of the mop without getting your hands wet. Benefits Deep-cleaning microfibre removes over 99% of bacteria and with just water* High-quality foot pedal activates spin wringing Suitable for all floors Splash Guard prevents water from splashing outside of the bucket. Front water spout to make emptying easier Easy to carry thanks to the balanced handle Easy to remove mop head, which is machine washable at 30°C; wash with similar textiles Adjustable mop handle Easy to use The mop system is very easy to use. Hold the handle loosely, while spinning the mop by pushing on the foot pedal. The telescopic handle can be adjusted to your ideal height. Carrying the bucket is easy with the lengthways handle, even when it’s full. Hands-free wringing The bucket includes a foot activated spinning mechanism to wring the mop head and adjust its dampness to your needs. Easy to pour out water Hold the bucket by handle and grip and pour water out easily without splashing. The balanced handle also stabilizes the bucket, so carrying it from room to room is safe and easy without spilling. Deep-Cleaning microfibre The effective 3in1 microfibres achieve up to 40% more cleaning power* through the innovative combination of strings and internal pad, which removes even dried on stubborn dirt. *Up to 40% more cleaning power on stubborn dirt vs. 100% Microfibre refill in a lab test. Corner cleaning The unique triangular head is perfectly designed for corner cleaning. Hygienically clean all floors The Vileda Turbo3in1 spin mop removes over 99% of Bacteria with JUST water* thanks to the microfibres in the pad. No need to use harsh chemicals to get a thorough clean. It is safe and effective on any hard floor surfaces – even delicate materials like ceramic tiles and parquet. Machine washable mop head Remove the mop head and clean it in your washing machine (at 30° C). Wash with similar textiles. For new cleaning power we recommend to replace it every 6 months. Sustainable cleaning system This mopping system contains more than 30% recycled material and is produced in Europe, which reduces its CO2 footprint. Our mission is to always work on new technologies and methods to give plastic a second life. Telescopic handle Extend the telescopic handle to the desired length; there is no need to bend down when mopping. When done with cleaning, reduce it again for convenient storage.
